settings.heading: Most Frequently Asked Questions
settings.content:
Q: What should I do if the mask doesn’t stick well?

A: For best adherence, we recommend applying the mask to freshly cleansed, slightly damp skin. Take a moment to smooth it out gently, pressing down around the contours of your face. If needed, you can lay back and relax while it works its magic — the extra time also allows for deeper absorption. Some slip is natural due to the serum-rich formula, but that’s part of what makes it so effective at delivering moisture.

Q: What ingredients are in this?

A: Our Bio-Collagen Mask is formulated with skin-supportive ingredients designed to deliver deep hydration and visible firmness. Key ingredients include:

  • Hydrolyzed fish collagen (from salmon) – known for its smaller molecular size, making it easier for the skin to absorb. It helps support elasticity, smoothness, and firmness, especially in aging or dehydrated skin.
  • Niacinamide – helps brighten skin and even out tone.
  • Hyaluronic acid – provides intense, long-lasting hydration and plumping.
  • Peptides – support collagen production and improve overall skin resilience.

The mask’s hydrogel base allows for slow-release absorption, helping the skin drink in every ingredient — not just sit on the surface.

Q: Is this vegan and cruelty-free?

A: We’re proud to say our mask is cruelty-free — absolutely no animal testing is involved at any stage of formulation or production.

While it does contain hydrolyzed collagen, which is not plant-derived, we source it responsibly from marine ingredients. We know terms like “vegan collagen” can be confusing — and while some plant-based ingredients can help support collagen production, true collagen itself can only come from fish-based sources.

That said, we’re always exploring more sustainable innovations while staying committed to delivering results — and kindness — through skincare.

Q:  Do I need to sit still for 3–4 hours to get the best results?

A: Not at all! The mask is designed to move with you — most of our customers wear it while winding down for the night, whether that’s reading, watching TV, or getting ready for bed.

In fact, 78% of users wear the mask while they sleep, and many report up to 24% better hydration and visible skin smoothness when used overnight. The longer it stays on, the more time your skin has to soak in the benefits — all while you rest.

Q: Doesn’t collagen come from within? How can this penetrate the skin?

A: You’re absolutely right — collagen is produced naturally in the body, but production slows with age. Our mask uses hydrolyzed marine collagen, which is broken down into smaller peptides that are better able to absorb into the upper layers of the skin. It’s not about replacing collagen deep inside — it’s about supporting the skin’s structure, hydration, and visible bounce from the outside in.

Q: How long do the effects last after using the mask?

A: You’ll typically notice immediate hydration and visible plumpness right after use. With weekly application, many customers see more long-term improvements in firmness and glow. Think of it as part of your ongoing skincare ritual, not just a one-time fix.

Q: Can the same mask be used more than once?

A: No — each mask is single-use only to ensure hygiene and ingredient effectiveness.

However, if you’d like to make the most of the remaining essence, you can place the used mask in a glass of water to dissolve any leftover serum. The resulting solution can be applied to the neck, hands, arms, or body as a lightweight, soothing essence.

settings.heading: How many masks are in a pack?
settings.content: In 1 pack there will be 4 high quality masks

settings.heading: How does it work?
settings.content:
We recommend using the mask 1-2 times per week for best results.

1️⃣ Prep – Cleanse your face & apply toner or serum.

2️⃣ Apply – Remove the mask from the pouch & peel off the protective foil.

3️⃣ Wear – Place it on your face & leave for 1-2 hours (or until transparent).

4️⃣ Remove – Gently take off the mask & pat in the extra essence.

5️⃣ Glow – Enjoy hydrated, plump, and radiant skin!

settings.heading: Should I wash after the mask?
settings.content: No, it is not necessary to wash your face after use. The remaining serum can be gently massaged into the skin for extra hydration.

settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.content:
Our Bio-Collagen Mask is formulated with skin-supportive ingredients designed to deliver deep hydration and visible firmness. Key ingredients include:

  • Hydrolyzed fish collagen (from salmon) – known for its smaller molecular size, making it easier for the skin to absorb. It helps support elasticity, smoothness, and firmness, especially in aging or dehydrated skin.
  • Niacinamide – helps brighten skin and even out tone.
  • Hyaluronic acid – provides intense, long-lasting hydration and plumping.
  • Peptides – support collagen production and improve overall skin resilience.

The mask’s hydrogel base allows for slow-release absorption, helping the skin drink in every ingredient — not just sit on the surface.

settings.heading: Key Benefits
settings.content:
Turn Back Time on Wrinkles: Smooth fine lines and wrinkles with every use, revealing youthful, glowing skin—no needles needed!

Glow That Gets Noticed: Brighten dull, tired skin and rediscover a radiant, fresh-faced glow that turns heads.

Simple to Use, Perfect Fit: Designed for effortless application and a snug fit, so you can mask your way to perfection—no mess, no fuss.

Luxurious Ingredients You Can Trust: Packed with premium, skin-loving nutrients, free from harsh chemicals, for visible results you’ll love.

All-in-One Beauty Boost: Say goodbye to dryness, puffiness, and uneven texture—one mask does it all for a smooth, hydrated complexion.

settings.heading: Can I use it for sensitive skin?
settings.content: Yes! Designed to be gentle on the skin. Our mask does not strip moisture or dry out, making it ideal for all skin types.

settings.heading: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Processing Time:
Once your order is placed, please allow 24 hours for us to process and prepare your order for shipment.

Shipping Time:
After your order is dispatched, it will typically take 4-6 business days to reach you, depending on your location.

Tracking Information:
Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email containing your tracking number. You can use this to track your package and stay updated on its delivery status.

Returns:
We want you to be fully satisfied with your purchase! If you are not completely happy with your order, we accept returns and exchanges within 60 days from the date of purchase.

Contact us via the website or via email: info@niforashop.com

settings.heading: Your Glow-Up Starts Here — Just Like Theirs
settings.sub_heading: Here's what some of them have to say about their favorite product

settings.text: Each ingredient in our Bio-Collagen Mask is thoughtfully selected and supported by science—not hype. We use no harsh fillers or hidden additives—just a clean, transparent formula infused with clinically backed ingredients like low-molecular collagen, hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, and more for visible, skin-loving results.

settings.title:
Hydrolyzed
Collagen
settings.text: Deep Absorption
settings.modal_text: Our Bio-Collagen Mask uses fish collagen — a type of animal collagen extracted from the skin, scales, and gills of fish. It is widely used in food, health care products, and cosmetics due to its excellent absorption and skin-rejuvenating properties. It helps boost firmness and elasticity, enhances hydration by locking in moisture, and supports skin repair—visibly reducing the appearance of fine lines and promoting a smoother, plumper complexion.

settings.title:
Hyaluronic
Acid
settings.text: Boosts Skin Hydration
settings.modal_text: Hyaluronic acid is a moisture-binding ingredient that deeply hydrates the skin, helping it appear plump, smooth, and supple. It holds up to 1,000 times its weight in water, supporting skin elasticity and reducing the look of fine lines. In the Bio-Collagen Mask, it enhances absorption and boosts the mask’s firming and rejuvenating effects.

settings.title: Vitamin E
settings.text: Skin Repair
settings.modal_text: Vitamin E is a powerful antioxidant that helps protect the skin from free radical damage and environmental stressors. It supports skin repair, soothes irritation, and strengthens the skin barrier. It works to nourish and protect the skin while enhancing moisture retention and promoting a smoother, healthier complexion.

settings.title: Niacinamide
settings.text: Brightening Agent
settings.modal_text: Niacinamide is an ingredient that helps brighten skin tone, reduce the appearance of pores, and improve skin texture. It also strengthens the skin barrier, regulates oil production, and soothes inflammation—making it ideal for sensitive or aging skin. In the Bio-Collagen Mask, it enhances the overall clarity, smoothness, and resilience of the skin.

settings.title: Glycerin
settings.text: Moisture Lock
settings.modal_text: Glycerin is a powerful humectant that draws moisture into the skin and helps maintain hydration levels. It works to soften rough patches, improve skin elasticity, and support the skin’s natural barrier. In the Bio-Collagen Mask, it helps lock in moisture, keeping the skin plump, smooth, and comfortable during and after use.

settings.title: Galactomyces
settings.text: Radiance Booster
settings.modal_text: Galactomyces is a fermented yeast extract rich in vitamins, amino acids, and antioxidants that help nourish and revitalize the skin. It works to improve skin clarity, refine pores, and balance sebum production. It enhances radiance, smooths texture, and supports a brighter, more even complexion.

settings.heading: 30–60 MINUTES (Quick Skin Refresh)
settings.text: Our mask grips like a second skin and begins to infuse hydration. Skin feels soothed, refreshed, and noticeably more radiant in under an hour.

settings.heading: 2–3 HOURS (Intensive Hydration Mode)
settings.text: As the actives absorb deeper, hydration intensifies. Collagen and peptides work to smooth fine lines, ease fatigue, and revive tired, dull-looking skin.

settings.heading: 3–4 HOURS (Visible Results After Use)
settings.text: Once the mask is removed, skin feels deeply hydrated, plumper, smoother, and more radiant — revealing a firmer, youthful-looking glow that lasts beyond the treatment.

settings.title: Minimizing Fine Lines & Wrinkles
settings.text: Formulated for mature skin, this mask is enriched with low-molecular collagen, niacinamide, and fish extract to target common signs of aging — such as fine lines, loss of elasticity, dryness, dullness, and uneven skin tone. It helps firm sagging areas, refine pores, smooth wrinkles, and boost hydration, leaving your skin noticeably plumper, brighter, and more youthful-looking after each use.

settings.title: The Korean Skincare Secret
settings.text: Give your skin the care it deserves. Our Bio-Collagen Mask blends low-molecular collagen with deep hydration and restores skin elasticity — for visibly younger, healthier-looking skin.

settings.title: Made For All Skin Types
settings.text: Clinically tested and specially formulated with gentle, non-toxic ingredients, this mask is ideal for mature and sensitive skin. It delivers powerful results without irritation — perfect for women seeking effective, age-conscious skincare they can trust.

settings.title: Busy? Let Your Skin Recharge!
settings.text: Busy days? Let our collagen mask do the work—deep hydration for plump, glowing skin in just 3 hours! ✨

settings.title: Visible Results After One Use
settings.text: From dry, tired, or uneven skin to smooth, radiant, and deeply hydrated — our masks are made to transform mature skin. Our mask refines texture, calm sensitivity, and bring back that healthy glow your skin deserves.

settings.question: How long do the effects last after using the mask?
settings.answer: You’ll notice instant hydration and plumpness right after use, which can last up to 24–48 hours. With weekly use, the benefits build over time — helping improve firmness, smoothness, and overall radiance.

settings.question: What are the delivery times?
settings.answer: Orders are processed within 1 business day and typically arrive in 5–8 business days after shipping. A tracking number will be emailed so you can follow your package’s journey.

settings.question: Do I need to sit still for 3–4 hours to get the best results?
settings.answer:
Not at all! The mask is designed to move with you — most of our customers wear it while winding down for the night, whether that’s reading, watching TV, or getting ready for bed.In fact, 78% of users wear the mask while they sleep, and many report up to 24% better hydration and visible skin smoothness when used overnight.

The longer it stays on, the more time your skin has to soak in the benefits — all while you rest.

settings.question: How many masks come in a pack?
settings.answer: Each pack contains 4 single-use masks. For best results, we recommend starting with 2 masks per week for the first month to quickly boost hydration and radiance

settings.question: Can the same mask be used more than once?
settings.answer:
No — each mask is single-use only to ensure hygiene and ingredient effectiveness.

However, if you’d like to make the most of the remaining essence, you can place the used mask in a glass of water to dissolve any leftover serum. The resulting solution can be applied to the neck, hands, arms, or body as a lightweight, soothing essence.

settings.question: Doesn’t collagen come from within? How can this penetrate the skin?
settings.answer: Yes, your body naturally produces collagen, but production slows with age. Our mask contains hydrolyzed marine collagen — broken down into smaller peptides that can better absorb into the skin’s surface layers. While it doesn’t replace collagen deep inside, it helps boost hydration, support skin structure, and restore visible firmness and bounce from the outside in.

settings.question: Should I wash my face after using the mask?
settings.answer: No, you don’t need to wash your face afterward. Simply massage the remaining serum into your skin to lock in extra hydration and maximize the benefits of the mask.

settings.question: Can I use the mask alongside my other skincare products?
settings.answer: Yes — Our Bio-Collagen Mask can easily be integrated into your regular skincare routine. For best results, apply it after cleansing and before heavier creams or oils. As with any new product, we recommend doing a patch test first to make sure it works well with your skin.

settings.question: What ingredients are in this?
settings.answer:
Bio-Collagen Mask is packed with skin-loving ingredients that hydrate, firm, and restore radiance:

  • Smaller molecules for better absorption, helping improve elasticity, smoothness, and firmness.
  • Brightens skin and evens out tone.
  • Delivers deep, long-lasting hydration and plumps the skin.
  • Support collagen production and boost skin resilience.

The hydrogel base ensures slow-release absorption, so your skin can fully drink in the actives for maximum results.

settings.question: Is this vegan and cruelty-free?
settings.answer:
Our mask is cruelty-free and never tested on animals.

However, it is not vegan as it contains collagen-derived ingredients.

settings.question: How often & how long should I use it?
settings.answer: Use the mask 1–2 times per week for optimal results. Leave it on for at least 60 minutes, though 3–4 hours (or overnight) is ideal for maximum absorption. The mask gradually turns transparent as nutrients soak in, and it won’t leave residue on your pillow.

settings.question: What should I do if the mask doesn’t stick well?
settings.answer: For best adherence, we recommend applying the mask to freshly cleansed, slightly damp skin. Take a moment to smooth it out gently, pressing down around the contours of your face. If needed, you can lay back and relax while it works its magic — the extra time also allows for deeper absorption. Some slip is natural due to the serum-rich formula, but that’s part of what makes it so effective at delivering moisture.

settings.question: Can I use it for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Designed to be gentle on the skin. Our mask does not strip moisture or dry out, making it ideal for all skin types.

settings.question: Money back-guarantee?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer money-back guarantee. If you don’t notice healthier skin, we’ll give you a full refund. Plus, enjoy our 60-day risk-free guarantee for peace of mind.

settings.question: How do I use the Mask?
settings.answer:
🧴 Evening Routine: Cleanse and tone your face, ensuring your skin is free from oil and creams.

🎭 Application: Start with the bottom piece, followed by the top. Gently press for optimal adherence. Pro tip: Tilt your head back for a perfect fit.

⏳ Duration:

Express Glow: 1-2 hours

Maximum Results: Leave it on overnight (ensure it’s fully dry to prevent shifting).

💖 The Reveal: Gently remove the mask and pat the remaining essence into your skin. Pro tip: Use excess serum on your neck and décolleté.
